daily_tip: Enable MFA on every account — passwords alone are not enough.

recent_cves.description:
Velociraptor versions prior to 0.76.4 contain a resource exhaustion vulnerability in the server's agent control channel.



This allows a compromised or rogue Velociraptor client to crash the server v

A weakness has been identified in MindsDB up to 26.01. This impacts the function exec of the file mindsdb/integrations/handlers/byom_handler/proc_wrapper.py of the component Engine Handler. Executing

A security vulnerability has been detected in MindsDB up to 26.01. Affected is the function pickle.loads of the component Pickle Handler. The manipulation leads to deserialization. The attack is possi
A vulnerability was detected in crocodilestick Calibre-Web-Automated up to 4.0.6. Affected by this vulnerability is the function generate_auth_token of the file cps/kobo_auth.py of the component Kobo
